Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: Janet Pond
Appearances:
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Lora's Laundry dba Express Cleaners, Edward Joseph Green, Jr. and Lora L Green.
Principal/Damages of $33,768.79
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $329.50
Interest of $1,202.50 For the total of $37,800.79
Judgment signed in open court.
